title: procris pedunculata var. stokesii
intro: Procris pedunculata var. stokesii, also known as the Australian Fire Bush or Stinking Passion Flower, is a plant species native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiparasitic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. The leaves and flowers of the plant can be made into herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
